detail: Validated init_tracing_full wiring for doc-viewer and spec-viewer with LOG_LEVEL/LOG_DIR-aware config and default target/logs paths. Evidence: cargo check --manifest-path tools/viewer/doc-viewer/Cargo.toml; cargo check --manifest-path memory-viewers/spec-viewer/Cargo.toml; launched both binaries on custom ports and observed runtime log lines 'File logging enabled to .../target/logs/doc-viewer.log' and '.../target/logs/spec-viewer.log'; confirmed files target/logs/doc-viewer.log.2026-07-05 and target/logs/spec-viewer.log.2026-07-05 exist.
